summary: The diff implements frontend admin authentication (REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4) with login form, session management, and logout functionality. However, the critical backend requirement (REQ-1) for secure password hashing and verification is completely missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a backend method to set and verify an admin password using secure hashing
missing_requirements.reason: The backend (main.mo) has no admin password storage, hashing, or verification methods. The frontend uses a temporary client-side hardcoded password check ('admin123') as noted in the truncated useQueries.ts code, which is explicitly marked as insecure and temporary.

hallucinated_features.description: Password visibility toggle (eye icon) in admin login form
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify password visibility toggle functionality. Only a password input field and submit button were requested.
The implementation includes a temporary client-side password check mechanism that was not requested. While this may be a placeholder, it represents functionality beyond the specification.
